title: erigeron acris subsp. acris
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. acris, also known as mountain fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erigeron acris subsp. acris include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Erigeron acris subsp. acris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
